name: find_closest_gridline_to_point
desc: Find the closest gridline to a point or room centroid.

parameters.name: xMm
parameters.description: X coordinate in mm (used when roomId not provided).

parameters.name: yMm
parameters.description: Y coordinate in mm (used when roomId not provided).

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: Optional room ID to use room centroid as point.
